standbyPanel.title: SYSTEM READY
standbyPanel.body: Initialize the 1km Aetheric Vortex to scrub local atmosphere of particulates and aerosols.

scrubbingPanel.title: VAYU-VORTEX PROTOCOL
scrubbingPanel.body: Golden Torus active. Synchronize breath with the 4-8-16 Vedic Light-Code pattern.

stabilizedPanel.title: VAYU-LOCK STABILIZED
stabilizedPanel.body: Sapphire Icosahedron locked. 24/7 passive hygroscopic net maintains atmospheric purity via the Apas element.
